Materials Science.title: Graphene-Reinforced Polymer Composites for Aerospace Structural Applications
Materials Science.description: This study investigates the mechanical and thermal properties of graphene nanoplatelet-reinforced epoxy composites, focusing on improving tensile strength and fracture toughness for next-generation aerospace structural panels. Materials Science.title: Self-Healing Cementitious Materials Using Microencapsulated Healing Agents
Materials Science.description: Development of autonomous self-healing cement-based materials embedded with microencapsulated calcium silicate hydrate precursors to arrest crack propagation and restore structural integrity without external intervention.

Materials Science.title: Nanostructured Titanium Alloys for Biomedical Implant Applications
Materials Science.description: Investigation of surface nanostructuring techniques on Ti-6Al-4V alloys to enhance osseointegration, corrosion resistance, and biocompatibility for load-bearing orthopaedic implants.

Computational Engineering.title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Turbulent Flow Prediction
Computational Engineering.description: Leveraging physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) to model turbulent Navier-Stokes equations, reducing computational cost while maintaining accuracy comparable to direct numerical simulation in complex duct geometries.

Computational Engineering.title: Topology Optimisation of Lattice Structures for Additive Manufacturing
Computational Engineering.description: Multi-objective topology optimisation framework for designing lightweight lattice infill structures in metal additive manufacturing, balancing stiffness, weight, and thermal dissipation requirements.

Smart Structures & IoT.title: Piezoelectric Energy Harvesting from Ambient Structural Vibrations
Smart Structures & IoT.description: Design and experimental validation of broadband piezoelectric transducers integrated into civil infrastructure for harvesting ambient vibration energy, powering wireless structural health monitoring sensor nodes.

Smart Structures & IoT.title: Digital Twin Framework for Real-Time Structural Health Monitoring
Smart Structures & IoT.description: A cloud-based digital twin architecture synchronising live sensor data from embedded MEMS accelerometers with finite element models to enable real-time damage detection and remaining useful life prediction for bridge structures.

Smart Structures & IoT.title: Machine Learning-Based Anomaly Detection in Industrial IoT Pipelines
Smart Structures & IoT.description: An end-to-end anomaly detection pipeline using LSTM autoencoders deployed on edge devices to identify fault signatures in rotating machinery, achieving 96.4% detection accuracy with sub-second latency.
